hypothesis: Incorporating chemically informed, concentration-dependent peak-shift (±10–30 cm−1) and bandwidth-broadening augmentations for hydrogen-bond donor–acceptor pairs into synthetic mixture generation will increase the model’s Top–10 accuracy from ~52% to ≥65% on a held-out set of ATR-IR binary mixtures containing alcohol–carboxylic acid and amine–carbonyl systems, relative to training on linear combinations alone.
